sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_empty_array (id Int32, arr Array(Int32));
SELECT id, emptyArrayToSingle(arr) AS new_arr FROM test_empty_array WHERE arr = [];
UPDATE test_empty_array SET arr = emptyArrayToSingle(arr) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayJoin(emptyArrayToSingle(arr)) AS single_element FROM test_empty_array;
